title: Katakuri Forces Luffy Past His Limit
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Carrot, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Big Mom as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub rub

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What is your wish, my master?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please, stop this, Lord Dai- Fuku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That little... she's taken our Helms again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why You Trouble- Some little Rabbit!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never knew Carrot could do something like that! She's like my little sister, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the phases of the moon and the clouds in the sky are on their side, they're pretty strong!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When those of the milk tribe stare directly into an uncluded full moon,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is said that deeply buried memories of a feral past are awakened...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And people call that white, violent form of theirs the sulong!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Usually, when a milk transforms, it's no help for anyone. They lose their minds, and simply mindlessly destroy everything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A milk unable to control THAT

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: tires themselves out so much fight- ing throughout the night that they die.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A double- edged sword. A technique that slaves away at one's very own life...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Miss Carrot, stealing the rudders of the enemy is truly a wonderful idea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Allow me to assist you, before we are forced to fight these enemies head- to-head!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, right! He's so light he can run on the water!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's let those two secure our path ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Brother Peros! Some- Thing's Wrong With Mama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's thinning out, and her breath is ragged...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's just focus on getting zes and prometheus over here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been about 8 hours since Mama's Eating Fit started!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've never been this unable to stop one of her tantrums... and I've never seen Mama be hungry.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From here on out, we'll be facing a Mama Unknown even to us! ♂

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 56 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
